description: User scrolls down the Explore page to view more research sessions.
frame_description: The list of research opportunities shifts upwards, revealing more items in the 'Sessions to schedule' section.

description: User continues scrolling down the Explore page to browse available tasks.
frame_description: The screen content moves vertically as the user scrolls through the list of cards.

description: User scrolls back up to the top of the Explore page.
frame_description: The 'Short tasks & surveys' section becomes visible again at the top of the screen.

description: User clicks on a task card to view its details.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over a task card before the screen transitions to a new view showing task details like pay ($8).
